ci_commands.description: Phase 38 B22: commands the operator runs locally to validate the plan before substantiate. Must match CI for deterministic parity. Required from Phase 38 forward; earlier plans grandfathered at test layer.

high_risk_target.description: Phase 54: declare whether the downstream system being supported by this Qor-logic invocation is itself a high-risk AI system per EU AI Act Annex III. Default false; when true, impact_assessment is required.

pr_target.description: Phase 83 (GH #87): the branch this plan will be merged into, when it is not the default branch (e.g. a release branch 'RC1.4'). Optional; absent for plans targeting the default branch. Consumed by /qor-audit Step 0.6 delivery_branch_lint and the Phase 37 Delivery-Branch Currency sub-check.

originating_remediation.description: Phase 68 (GH #44): free-form reference to the issue, incident, or SG pattern this plan remediates (e.g., 'GH #44', 'SG-PlanTextDrift-A', 'COREFORGE 3-VETO cycle 2026-05-08'). Read by /qor-audit Step 3.5 (Self-Application Sub-Pass): when set, the auditor manually performs the to-be-introduced discipline against the plan's own content. Optional; absence skips the sub-pass.

impact_assessment.description: Phase 54: optional NIST AI RMF MAP-3.1/MAP-5.1 + EU AI Act Art. 9 risk-register block. Required when high_risk_target is true.

feature_inventory_touches.description: Phase 73 (GH #41): per-feature TDD declaration block. Each entry names a feature touched by this plan, the operation kind, and the test path + descriptor that proves the feature works. Required-when-touching-src/ enforcement is operator discipline in V1; mechanical lint deferred to V2. Empty array is acceptable for plans that touch only docs/governance.
